text:
miwi        2008-11-21 20:45:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-constant-lexical Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module creates compile-time constants in the manner of
  constant.pm, but makes them local to the enclosing scope.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/constant-lexical/
  
  PR:             ports/128900
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3262    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/devel/p5-constant-lexical/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-constant-lexical/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/p5-constant-lexical/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-constant-lexical/pkg-plist (new)
